mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maintenance ( booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{bookingId}, #{technicianId}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{diagnosisNotes}, #{workPerformed}, #{partsUsed}, #{laborHours}, #{totalCost}, #{warrantyPeriod}, #{qualityCheckPassed}, #{customerSignature}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at FROM maintenance WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at FROM maintenance WHERE booking_id = #{bookingId}

SELECT id, booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at FROM maintenance WHERE technician_id = #{technicianId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at FROM maintenance WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at FROM maintenance WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT m.id, m.booking_id, m.technician_id, m.status, m.started_at, m.completed_at, m.diagnosis_notes, m.work_performed, m.parts_used, m.labor_hours, m.total_cost, m.warranty_period, m.quality_check_passed, m.customer_signature, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM maintenance m INNER JOIN bookings b ON m.booking_id = b.id WHERE b.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT m.id, m.booking_id, m.technician_id, m.status, m.started_at, m.completed_at, m.diagnosis_notes, m.work_performed, m.parts_used, m.labor_hours, m.total_cost, m.warranty_period, m.quality_check_passed, m.customer_signature, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM maintenance m INNER JOIN bookings b ON m.booking_id = b.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE maintenance SET technician_id = #{technicianId}, status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, diagnosis_notes = #{diagnosisNotes}, work_performed = #{workPerformed}, parts_used = #{partsUsed}, labor_hours = #{laborHours}, total_cost = #{totalCost}, warranty_period = #{warrantyPeriod}, quality_check_passed = #{qualityCheckPassed}, customer_signature = #{customerSignature}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at FROM maintenance WHERE status IN ('RECEIVED', 'DIAGNOSING', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'QUALITY_CHECK') AND technician_id = #{technicianId} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT id, booking_id, technician_id, status, started_at, completed_at, diagnosis_notes, work_performed, parts_used, labor_hours, total_cost, warranty_period, quality_check_passed, customer_signature, created_at, updated_at FROM maintenance WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND completed_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_count, AVG(labor_hours) as avg_labor_hours, SUM(total_cost) as total_revenue FROM maintenance WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) = #{month}
